project.component: { "keyToString": { "CMake 应用程序.rtthread.elf.executor": "Debug", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "OpenOCD 下载并运行.openocd.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.RadMigrateCodeStyle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "RunOnceActivity.west.config.association.type.startup.service": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "org.rust.first.attach.projects": "true", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "CMakeSettings", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

item.itemvalue: 嵌入式 GDB 服务器.未命名

MESSAGE.value: 添加了usb的设备文件，更换了磁编码器的选型采用vce755q
